positive: Minimalist celestial forest scene, deep sapphire blue and gold ink palette. A large, stylized crescent moon hangs prominently among bioluminescent, gnarled trees that form an intricate silhouette against a deep, gradient indigo night sky. The trees feature delicate, repeating geometric patterns (like stylized celtic knots or mandalas) integrated into their leaves and branches. The ground is covered in a scattering of glowing geometric star clusters and faint constellations. Focus on clean, high-contrast linework, strong graphic impact, and a symmetrical, centralized composition. Clean vector art style, suitable for screen printing on dark fabric, 2D graphic, symmetrical, high detail.
negative: photorealistic, 3d render, fuzzy, noisy, blurry, watermark, text, signature, low contrast, messy, ugly, artifacts, grain, bokeh, logo, writing
